name: chat-realtime
summary: 1:1 + group chat over Supabase Realtime — tables, RLS, realtime, send/read. Key-free (uses the skeleton's Supabase).
postInstall: Requires the Supabase auth from Phase 2 (sign-in) — chat is per authenticated user.
Apply the migration: copy supabase/0010_chat.sql into supabase/migrations/ (next number) then `supabase db reset && supabase test db`.
Realtime works on the Supabase free tier — no extra keys/services.
Render a thread with <MessageThread conversationId={id} />; list with listConversations(); start a DM with createDirectConversation(otherUserId).
Replace src/features/chat/ui/message-thread.tsx after the Claude Design pass (build the conversation list + bubbles there).
